---
name: Feature request / spec proposal
about: Propose a feature, integration, or change to the ABOM format
title: "[proposal] "
labels: enhancement
---

**Problem**
What gap or use case is this addressing?

**Proposal**
What you'd like to see. For spec changes, show the proposed field(s) and an
example ABOM document using them.

**Alternatives considered**
Other approaches and why this one.

**Impact on the standard**
- [ ] This is a spec change (affects `spec/` and every ABOM emitted)
- [ ] Additive (no version bump) / Breaking (needs a version bump)
- [ ] CycloneDX alignment considered
